name: MAC Aura
comment:
moving wash:
- single-lens wash with fully premixed color 
- broad color palette, RGBW color mixing 
- eye-candy Aura EffectsTM
Note: If "Color Calib" (see settings) is enabled, "Beam White" has no effect – white LEDs are activated by RGB mixing

capabilities.comment: Calibrated color output mode COLOR CALIB = ON
Raw color output mode COLOR CALIB = OFF
Fast dimming, speed of changes unrestricted
Smooth dimming, speed of changes restricted slightly
